chunks.title: Oracle of Doom for Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Yahweh declares the finality of judgment and the four types of doom awaiting the people.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Lament and Yahweh's Response
chunks.reason: Jeremiah expresses his distress over his calling, followed by Yahweh's promise of deliverance and plunder.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Plea and Final Promise
chunks.reason: Jeremiah appeals to God for vindication based on his loyalty, culminating in Yahweh's assurance of protection.
